name: QuickMail Cold Email Automation API
what_it_does: Cold email automation platform with REST API — enabling multi-inbox cold email campaigns with automatic warm-up, follow-up sequences, team inbox management, deliverability monitoring, and prospect management for sales teams and agencies.
use_cases: Managing cold email campaigns and follow-up sequences programmatically via API
Querying campaign analytics (opens, replies, clicks, bounces) for sales dashboards
Adding prospects to outreach campaigns from external lead sources via API
Monitoring email deliverability and inbox health metrics for proactive management
Automating prospect status updates and CRM sync based on email reply events
not_for: Transactional email and product notifications (use Postmark or SendGrid)
Marketing email to opted-in subscribers (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo)
Full sales engagement with multi-channel (phone, LinkedIn) sequences
best_when: A sales development team or agency needs automated cold email outreach with deliverability-focused inbox warming and multi-inbox management, with simple API for prospect and campaign management.
avoid_when: You need multi-channel outreach beyond email, AI-powered personalization at scale, or a CRM-embedded sales engagement platform.

auth.notes: API key from QuickMail account settings. Passed as X-API-Key header. Account-scoped access. Webhook for prospect events (replied, bounced, unsubscribed, clicked). No OAuth2. Email account connections use OAuth (Gmail, Outlook) separately.

pricing.notes: Founded 2015. French-founded company. Competitive deliverability focus — inbox warming and health monitoring built-in. Agency-friendly with team workspaces. Unlimited follow-up sequences on all plans. Native integrations with Zapier, HubSpot, Pipedrive. Strong deliverability tools differentiator.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, prospects, email accounts, and analytics. X-API-Key header auth. Good API documentation. Email account OAuth (Gmail, Outlook) required separately. Webhook for prospect engagement events. Campaign scheduling and sequence step management via API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Prospect reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Prospect addition is append-only — check for duplicate before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: Gmail/Outlook OAuth required separately from API key for email sending
Inbox limits per plan — verify plan supports required number of sending accounts
Prospect deduplication important — check for existing prospect before API add
CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance required — implement unsubscribe and opt-out
Cold email legality varies by country — verify jurisdiction before campaigns

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliant. EU and US data residency options. X-API-Key header auth. Gmail and Outlook OAuth tokens require secure storage. Prospect PII requires GDPR-compliant data retention. Cold email scale carries sender reputation risk.
